title: EasyGAPs
description: Easy GAP Minecraft Datapack. Mostly Used In SMPs, or PvP Servers.
body:
# EasyGAPs🍎
Easier Crafting recipe for Golden Apples. Mostly used in SMPs, or PvP servers. This can speed up the grinding session in a SMP, or PvP Server.

# Recipe:
![EasyGAP Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc89a61b8943f3d1038e0261503110b26c083b66.png)

## Server Installation
**(This can be different for other operating systems.)**
1. Open main Server Folder,
2. Go to <world> -> <datapacks>,
3. Paste 'EasyGAPs' into the <datapacks> folder.

## World Installation
**(This can be different for other operating systems.)**
1. Windows + R, Type "%appdata%", Enter,
2. Open <.minecraft> folder,
3. Go to <saves> -> <'your_world_name'> -> <datapacks>,
4. Paste 'EasyGAPs' into the <datapacks> folder.
